div.p: Partitioned old leader cannot confirm leadership - read blocked or redirected

g.text: T=3: Client Read to Stale Leader
T=4 (Alternative): Client Retries to New Leader

div.p: Guarantee: Once a write is acknowledged, all subsequent reads see that write.

ol.li: Leader confirms it's still leader via heartbeat quorum
Client must retry to valid leader

div.p: Without ReadIndex: Stale leader could return stale data, violating linearizability.

ul.li: L1 still thinks term 3, still leader
L1 doesn't know it's been deposed

div.p: ReadIndex Result: ❌ Confirmations: 1 (self only) ❌ Required: 3 (majority of 5) ❌ Status: TIMEOUT Response to Client:
WrongLeader: true LeaderId: "" (unknown) Success: false Error: "leadership confirmation timeout"
ReadIndex Success: ✓ Confirmations: 3+ (majority) ✓ Required: 3 ✓ Status: CONFIRMED Response:
